name: Grok 4.5
description: Grok 4.5 is an xAI chat and reasoning model with text and image input, text output, function calling, structured outputs, and a 500k token context window.

details.name: pricing
details.value: Standard pricing up to 200k context: $2.00 input, $0.50 cached input, $6.00 output per 1M tokens. Higher-context pricing above 200k context: $4.00 input, $1.00 cached input, $12.00 output per 1M tokens. Priority Processing is 2x the applicable standard tier.

details.name: higher_context_pricing
details.value: Requests above the 200k context threshold use higher-context pricing: $4.00 input, $1.00 cached input, and $12.00 output per 1M tokens.

details.name: release_observation_note
details.value: Public availability was observed in xAI docs and the xAI console on 2026-07-08; xAI docs do not expose a separate release-date field.
